tools.name: fetch_hn_top_stories
tools.description: Fetch the Hacker News front page (https://news.ycombinator.com/), parse the HTML, and return the top 15 stories as a list of records, each containing: title (str), points (int), and domain (str). The domain should be extracted from the story's URL (e.g. "github.com"). If a story has no external URL (e.g. Ask HN), use "news.ycombinator.com" as the domain.
